title: Commit window opened: expert active-workflow bundle
body: Salty Rolling Compass opened git:index/head claim 71d2350e-5648-4f61-a631-6a44ea924d0a to commit the expert template/adaptor active-workflow bundle only. Staged set was empty before opening. Pathspecs: four canonical expert templates (accessibility, assumptions, design-system, elasticsearch), matching changed Claude/Cursor/Codex adapters for accessibility/assumptions/design-system, and .codex/config.toml. Practice and collaboration-state files remain unstaged for later logical commits.
